chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Federal Excise Reference Application Nos. 18 & 19 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution of Reference application as notice not issued cost not paid. ----------- 04.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Applicant. ************ Matter is coming up for non-prosecution for the last three dates of hearing as no compliance has been made; therefore, these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Application. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
